## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Daily or lightweight brief
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Workflow / automation
- [ ] Validator / quality tooling
- [ ] Source map / research rules

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Factual claims are sourced.
- [ ] Facts and interpretation are separated.
- [ ] No buy/sell/hold financial advice is included.
- [ ] Dates are explicit for time-sensitive claims.
- [ ] New or edited daily reports follow `daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md`.
- [ ] Telegram alert text is concise and safe.
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_repo.py` passes or the reason is explained.

## Notes

Add anything reviewers should know.
